title: Run control and fusion tests in simulation
description: Execute the simulation/test suite for timing, transforms, fusion, and the safety stop, and report deadline and fault results.
body: Use when validating a robotics change before hardware. Actions: detect the toolchain (ROS2 launch/test, Gazebo), run the simulation and test suite covering control-loop timing/jitter, tf transform correctness, sensor-fusion behavior under dropped measurements, and emergency-stop response under injected faults; report jitter histograms, fault outcomes, and any deadline miss. Do not declare hardware-readiness from a single nominal sim run. This skill exposes capability only and must not actuate real hardware without runtime permission. Validation signals include bounded jitter, correct transforms, graceful fusion degradation, and a working stop under faults. Risk boundary: if the stop or fault handling is untested, report the change as not hardware-ready and recommend simulation fault coverage first.
